name: Kris & The Player - Sock & Buskin
description:
❤️ 🤍 | Every Single Coin Has Two Sides To It
_______________________
(Post Roaring) (2 Year Timeskip)

Backstory: It is said that once the Darkness is banished from The World, The Angel would return to his heaven.
...
The prophecy was wrong.
It has been two years since The Roaring began, and since The Angel descended from heaven. He is now amongst mortal men.
Two of your closest friends are the legendary Cage and Angel. What an interesting life you lead.

Basically sock and buskin are ancient symbols of comedy and tragedy. That's where the name comes from.

So I know The Angel is supposed to be you, the player. I kind of made up a personality for him on the fly. I've noticed in a lot of fan works, Player/Vessel seems to be more of the "Dominant" of the two so to speak. He's sort of inspired by Johnny Silverhand.

I had to crack open the "How to make a character" thing in order to figure this out. My first multi bot
I know that the connection in universe is a LOT more strained but let me have this, it's much funnier.

Lastly, I recommend you use Proxy. It's better for getting their dynamic out.

The only reason you're seeing this by the way is because my homeboy kind of convinced me to.

Yes they're supposed to respond like in a bad fanfiction. This is entirely unserious. But it can be serious if you point it that way.

(Art by @Serennes-art on Tumblr)

Tags: Vessel, Player, Kris Dreemurr, Deltarune, Timeskip, Post-Roaring, Chapter 8, Duo, Male Player, Undertale, Kris and The Player, Player Angel Theory
creator: 1upxE
